subject: char.hank
oneLine: A charismatic hot sauce artisan and storyteller whose family recipe and theatrical personality make him a beloved fixture of the McGolrick Park farmers market — and the central figure of the group's first mystery.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/characters/hank.md

subject: char.dorothy
oneLine: A no-nonsense honey vendor at the McGolrick Park farmers market who provides Emma with a crucial piece of physical evidence — a bottle of Hank's heritage hot sauce — and emotional context about his state of mind before he disappeared.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/characters/dorothy.md

subject: char.sofia
oneLine: A veteran Williamsburg cheesemonger who provides Emma with the first real clue about what happened to Hank — that he received "a big offer" to "go legit."
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/characters/sofia.md

subject: char.marcus
oneLine: The stylish owner of a Williamsburg boutique who serves as one of Olivia's key neighborhood contacts and an early source of intel about Hank's strange behavior.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/characters/marcus.md

subject: char.brenda-marquez
oneLine: A sharp commercial real estate professional and old acquaintance of Jasper's who inadvertently becomes the bridge between the group's investigation and the mogul's retaliation.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/characters/brenda-marquez.md

subject: char.food-critic
oneLine: An influential and respected national food critic whose endorsement of the group's story turns the tide in their campaign against the mogul.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/characters/food-critic.md
